name: whatsapp-crm
description: WhatsApp CRM for Pakistani COD Sellers - Root Package

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../worker && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.prisma:generate: cd backend && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../worker && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.lint:all: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
